ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime */,
  "month_reported" TEXT /* Month when the crime was reported */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date when the crime occurred */,
  "new_crime_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator if the crime is new */,
  "unfounded_crime_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator if the crime was unfounded */,
  "admin_adjustment_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator for administrative adjustments made */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences (1 for each reported crime) */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the crime occurred */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the crime occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "ileads_address" TEXT /* ILEADS address for the crime location */,
  "ileads_street" TEXT /* ILEADS street for the crime location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location where the crime took place */,
  "location_comment" TEXT /* Comments regarding the location */,
  "cad_address" TEXT /* CAD address for dispatch purposes */,
  "cad_street" TEXT /* CAD street for dispatch purposes */,
  "x_coord" REAL /* X coordinate for mapping */,
  "y_coord" REAL /* Y coordinate for mapping */,
  "incident_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident category */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the crime report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_incident_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_category_id") REFERENCES incident_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the type of crime */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "police_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the police station responsible for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_police_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("police_station_id") REFERENCES police_stations ("police_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district to which the neighborhood belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "police_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the police station where the officer is stationed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_officers_police_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("police_station_id") REFERENCES police_stations ("police_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime associated with the report */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who filed the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was filed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the report */,
  "incident_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES reporting_officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes reported */,
  "violent_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of violent crimes reported */,
  "property_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of property crimes reported */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime the feedback is related to */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the public */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Response to the public feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_feedback_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_comment" TEXT /* Comments regarding the location */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate entry */,
  "x_coord" REAL /* X coordinate for mapping */,
  "y_coord" REAL /* Y coordinate for mapping */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime associated with these coordinates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, officer, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_stations" (
  "police_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police station */,
  "police_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the police station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the police station */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the police station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("police_station_id")
)
